achievements.BestTimeDescription: Tracks the players' fastest completion time, and will upgrade at specific notable minute barriers. The level of this badge is determined by the players' fastest completion in Ranked mode
achievements.HighestWinStreakDescription: Tracks the number of matches won in a row. The level of this badge is determined by the length of the players' longest winstreak.
achievements.PlayedMatchesDescription: Tracks the total number of matches a player has played, and the will upgrade as you play more matches.
achievements.PlaytimeDescription: Tracks the total amount of time spent playing MCSR Ranked. The achievement upgrades as you play for longer
achievements.WinsDescription: Tracks the total number of matches won. All matches won in ranked mode will count towards this achievement, regardless of how it was won.
achievements.SeasonOutcomeDescription: After a season ends, players will earn an achievement based on their final leaderboard placement.
achievements.PlayoffsOutcomeDescription: After playoffs ends, each participant will earn an achievement based on their result.
achievements.SummonWitherDescription: Win a match after killing the wither
achievements.IronPicklessDescription: Win a match without ever crafting an iron pickaxe
achievements.OneshotDescription: Win a match after killing the Ender Dragon with a single arrow
achievements.OvertakeDescription: Reset the world while in the End, and then win the match
achievements.FoodlessDescription: Win a match without eating any food
achievements.ClassicRunDescription: Win a match without entering a bastion
achievements.NetheriteDescription: Win a match with a netherite ingot in your inventory
achievements.ArmorlessDescription: Win a match without ever wearing armor
achievements.HighLevelDescription: Win a match with at least 60 experience levels
achievements.EgapHolderDescription: Obtain an enchanted golden apple, and win the match without eating it
achievements.IronHoeDescription: Win a match with an iron hoe in your inventory
achievements.WeeklyRaceDescription: At the end of a weekly race, players will earn an achievement based on their leaderboard placement for that race.

errors.default: An error occurred while loading the data.

errors.loadingError: An error occurred while loading the data.

filters.noMatchesFound: No matches found with current filters

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started with MCSR Ranked
gettingStarted.subtitle: Your guide to joining the competitive Minecraft speedrunning community. Learn how to set up, play, and improve your skills.

whatIs.title: What is MCSR Ranked?
whatIs.description: MCSR Ranked is a competitive matchmaking system for Minecraft speedrunning. It pairs players of similar skill levels to race against each other in real-time, tracking your performance with an ELO rating system similar to chess.
whatIs.description2: The mod runs on Minecraft 1.16.1 and uses specially filtered seeds to ensure fair competition. Both players receive the same seed and identical RNG conditions, so victory comes down to pure skill and strategy.

features.rankedDesc: Climb from Coal to Netherite rank
features.fairDesc: Same seed and RNG for both players

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.accountItem1: Legitimate Minecraft Account - Cracked launchers and accounts are not supported
requirements.restrictionItem1: Modified clients like Lunar Client are not allowed
requirements.restrictionItem2: Only mods from the official whitelist are permitted

installation.title: Installation
installation.description: MCSR Ranked offers modpacks for easy setup, available for Windows, macOS, and Linux. Choose one of the supported launchers below:
installation.prismDesc: Recommended launcher with easy mod management
installation.modrinthDesc: Modern launcher with built-in mod support
installation.normalPackDesc: Basic mods needed for MCSR Ranked - best for most players
installation.standardPackDesc: Includes pre-configured game settings for speedrunning
installation.allRsgPackDesc: Comprehensive mod collection for Random Seed Glitchless category

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.step1Desc: Start the game with the MCSR Ranked modpack installed
howToPlay.step2Desc: If the button is greyed out, check your connection or mod version
howToPlay.step3Desc: Play your first matches to establish your initial ELO rating. Progress matters - go as far as you can!
howToPlay.step4Desc: Ranked mode typically finds opponents in 1-3 minutes
howToPlay.rankedModeDesc: Competitive matches that affect your ELO rating. Win to gain points, lose to drop. Matchmaking prioritizes skill-balanced opponents.
howToPlay.casualModeDesc: Practice without affecting your rank. Queue times may be longer unless you enable "Unlimited Casual Queue" for wider matchmaking.
howToPlay.matchmakingSettingsDesc: Access via Ranked > Settings > Matchmaking settings:
howToPlay.accurateDesc: Narrower ELO range, longer wait times

rankingSystem.title: Understanding the Ranking System
rankingSystem.description: MCSR Ranked uses an ELO rating system, similar to chess, to measure player skill. Win matches to gain points, lose matches to drop points. The amount gained or lost depends on your opponent's rating - beating higher-rated players rewards more points.
rankingSystem.eloDecayDesc: Top 150 players face decay penalties. After 7+ days of inactivity, you'll lose 5 ELO per day until you play again.
rankingSystem.seasonsDesc: Ratings reset each season, requiring new placement matches. This keeps competition fresh and gives everyone a clean start.
rankingSystem.seedDistributionDesc: Higher ranks unlock more diverse seed types:
rankingSystem.seedEmerald: Emerald+ (1200+): All seed types including Buried Treasure

tools.title: Essential Tools
tools.description: These community-developed tools are widely used by speedrunners to enhance their gameplay experience. All are approved for use in official speedrun submissions.
tools.jingleDesc: An all-inclusive Minecraft speedrunning application for single-instance gameplay. Handles instance management, world clearing, and various quality-of-life features.
tools.ninjabrainDesc: Calculates stronghold locations through triangulation using ender eye throws. Accounts for measurement accuracy and provides confidence percentages.
tools.ninjabrainTip: Tip: Calibrate your "standard deviation" setting based on your precision at reading ender eye angles (typically 0.005-0.200).

resources.title: More Guides & Resources
resources.description: Continue your learning journey with these official resources and community guides.
resources.wikiDesc: Complete official documentation for installation and gameplay
resources.websiteDesc: Official website with downloads and announcements
resources.discordDesc: Get help in #tech-help and connect with other players
resources.modrinthDesc: Download the mod and check version updates
resources.seedGuideDesc: Learn about seed filtering and structure spawns
resources.rngGuideDesc: Understand how RNG is balanced for fair play
resources.eloGuideDesc: Deep dive into the ranking system mechanics
resources.faqDesc: Common questions and solutions to issues
resources.approvedModsDesc: Official whitelist of allowed speedrunning mods
resources.readyToTrack: Ready to track your progress? Search for your username above or explore the leaderboard!

gettingStarted.attribution: This guide summarizes information from the official MCSR Ranked Wiki. For the most up-to-date and detailed information, please refer to the original documentation.
